title: Official Game Resilience Calibration Basket
description: Surface-specific H2H basket used to calibrate GAME_RESILIENCE_COEF in engine.js. Chosen for sufficient real-match sample and sensitivity to game-level resilience / streak control.

matchups.note: Elite hard-court control under repeated pressure.
Deep clay resilience and response swings.
Two elite returners with strong game control.
Federer expected to suppress negative streaks.
Big-server matchup where resilience should help Djokovic close.
Clay resilience without overcooking the base clay edge.
